name: Dual Ether
description: Fast and precise. The Dual Ether cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing' infested allies. Capable of hitting multiple targets.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fang Prime and Dual Ether having the incorrect Mastery Rank requirement.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing sounds on Fang Prime / Dual Ether Dagger melee attacks.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: The Obex, Dual Ether Daggers, Vaykor Hek and Ankyros series can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.4: Double Affinity Weekend!
patchlogs.changes: Dual Ether, Afuris, and Affinity Booster package is in the Market. Any Affinity Boosters this weekend will result in… QUAD AFFINITY!
